item.title: AliceInWonderland
item.description: This is a web challenge that reflects the name of the challenge because it is full of rabbit holes. You can found multiple vulnerabilities in this web portal that literally leads you to nothingness.

item.title: Break The Storage
item.description: This is a web challenge that shows the impact of a hard-coded credential which can be used by attackers to login as authenticated user on the web page.

item.title: Cat Dalmation
item.description: This is a web challenge that shows an endpoint or file that accept both GET and POST request and shows a different response.
